generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance PositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor monitoring the linear guide position of the laboratory-scale gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionTelemetry
]

instance VelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Velocity sensor monitoring the speed of the crane’s linear guide."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VelocityTelemetry
]

instance AccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Acceleration sensor monitoring the acceleration of the crane’s linear guide."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerationTelemetry
]

instance LoadWeightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load weight sensor measuring the payload weight carried by the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LoadWeightTelemetry
]

instance SensorStatusSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor status monitoring the health state of the crane’s control system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorStatusTelemetry
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (Data transmitted)
instance PositionTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensor
]

instance VelocityTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VelocitySensor
]

instance AccelerationTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerationSensor
]

instance LoadWeightTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LoadWeightSensor
]

instance SensorStatusTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensorStatusSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GantryKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML kinematic model describing the geometry and degrees of freedom of the laboratory-scale gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler
]

instance GantryDynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model capturing inertia and control dynamics used for optimal trajectory generation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler
]

// Data instances resulting from transmitted telemetry
instance PositionTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position telemetry data stored in TimescaleDB after preprocessing (unit conversion and outlier filtering)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBLoggerEnabler, MQTTPublisherEnabler
]

instance VelocityTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity telemetry data stored in TimescaleDB after preprocessing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBLoggerEnabler, MQTTPublisherEnabler
]

instance AccelerationTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration telemetry data stored in TimescaleDB after preprocessing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBLoggerEnabler, MQTTPublisherEnabler
]

instance LoadWeightTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Load weight telemetry data stored in TimescaleDB after preprocessing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LoadWeightTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBLoggerEnabler, MQTTPublisherEnabler
]

instance SensorStatusTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor status telemetry data stored in TimescaleDB after preprocessing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorStatusTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBLoggerEnabler, MQTTPublisherEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBLoggerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Logs telemetry into TimescaleDB using PostgreSQL INSERT or COPY operations after preprocessing."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTPublisherEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Publishes telemetry to an MQTT broker for downstream services such as real‑time monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SimulationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runs kinematic and dynamic simulations of the gantry crane based on AutomationML models."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ControlExecutorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes optimal control commands on the physical gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs continuous validation by comparing measured telemetry against simulated trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time monitoring of the crane’s position, velocity, acceleration, and load weight."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal control commands for the gantry crane using the dynamic model."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPerformanceInsight, ExecuteControlCommand
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs continuous validation overlay by comparing measured telemetry against simulated trajectories and calculating distance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationMetricInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages comprehensive historical data logging in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateInsight, ValidationMetricInsight, ControlPerformanceInsight
]

instance InteractiveDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization dashboard for operators to monitor crane state and performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateInsight, ValidationMetricInsight, ControlPerformanceInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance CraneStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the current position, velocity, acceleration, and load weight of the crane."
]

instance ValidationMetricInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing distance metrics between physical telemetry and simulated trajectories."
]

instance ControlPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight assessing control performance of computed commands."
]

instance ExecuteControlCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes the computed optimal control command on the physical gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are issued by the Control Application to the Physical Crane Interface in JSON form, specifying target positions or trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service.  The commands include kinematic parameters such as desired gantry X/Y coordinates and trolley weight distribution.  The Physical Crane Interface validates commands (e.g., bounds checking) before forwarding them to the crane controllers over the same connection used for telemetry.  After command execution, the physical crane emits updated state information that is logged and inspected by the Continuous Validation Service, which alerts operators via the Grafana Dashboard if deviations exceed a pre‑set threshold.  The document does not detail authentication, conflict‑resolution or explicit feedback‑confirmation protocols."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin’s services communicate through an MQTT broker using the standard MQTT protocol over TCP.  The architecture is therefore a message‑bus based topology where each container (Logging Application, Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, digital twin services) acts as a publisher/subscriber on relevant topics.  No further network‑layer details such as bandwidth, latency, redundancy or security mechanisms are described in the document."
]
